summary: Drop the two targeting novel commands (targeting where/unused), collapse the order-graph targeting fan-out to order -> line-items only, and de-scope the 'inventory orphans' description to placement coverage only.
reason: Ad Manager REST v1 LineItem exposes no targeting field (confirmed via live list + detail), so the generated targeting-where/targeting-unused commands, the order -> targeting -> ad-units fan-out, and the 'stale or empty branches' orphan claim all produced empty or misleading output. Removed them rather than ship features that cannot work on REST v1.
validated_outcome: order graph returns order -> line-items (goal, type, flight dates) against the live network; help, README, and manifest no longer advertise targeting commands or unimplemented orphan-branch detection.
